raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Is your query asking for an assessment of the research idea's validity and novelty, or for suggestions on improving the writing and overall presentation?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The vague delegation 'What do you think?' on a research artifact implies central interest in evaluating and potentially reframing the thesis and contribution.","R1.2":"General thoughts on the draft centrally involve checking the logical flow of arguments from setup to conclusions.","R1.3":"Assessing the draft includes verifying if reported results align with the claims made.","R1.4":"The query seeks opinions on the work, centrally including an estimation of its novelty against prior approaches.","R1.6":"Feedback on the draft centrally encompasses polishing the sentence-level writing for clarity and conciseness.","RX.1":"A general opinion on research writing expects disclosure of uncertainties in the presented claims.","RX.2":"Thoughts on the draft should centrally avoid or identify overclaims in the results and arguments.","RX.3":"The delegation implies adhering to the scope of the described work without unwarranted expansions.","RX.4":"While peripheral, general feedback on an AI tool might touch on potential downstream harms like misuse in surveillance.","RX.5":"Peripheral to the query but always relevant is ensuring traceability of the methods and data sources."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Is your query asking for an assessment of the research idea's validity and novelty, or for suggestions on improving the writing and overall presentation?

rationale.R1.1: The vague delegation 'What do you think?' on a research artifact implies central interest in evaluating and potentially reframing the thesis and contribution.
rationale.R1.2: General thoughts on the draft centrally involve checking the logical flow of arguments from setup to conclusions.
rationale.R1.3: Assessing the draft includes verifying if reported results align with the claims made.
rationale.R1.4: The query seeks opinions on the work, centrally including an estimation of its novelty against prior approaches.
rationale.R1.6: Feedback on the draft centrally encompasses polishing the sentence-level writing for clarity and conciseness.
rationale.RX.1: A general opinion on research writing expects disclosure of uncertainties in the presented claims.
rationale.RX.2: Thoughts on the draft should centrally avoid or identify overclaims in the results and arguments.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation implies adhering to the scope of the described work without unwarranted expansions.
rationale.RX.4: While peripheral, general feedback on an AI tool might touch on potential downstream harms like misuse in surveillance.
rationale.RX.5: Peripheral to the query but always relevant is ensuring traceability of the methods and data sources.
